purpose: Scarcity signal and restock announcement — empty shelf or returning product visual that creates FOMO and drives immediate purchase action.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Product scarcity and restock announcement photography, {scenario}: SOLD OUT version — {featured_product} single last unit on otherwise empty premium shelf or display stand, dramatic spotlight on final product, empty space around it emphasizing scarcity, OR BACK IN STOCK version — {featured_product} freshly restocked in abundance on shelf with bold visual impact suggesting arrival, {brand_color_palette} brand-coherent environment, warm directional spotlight on product hero, clean retail or studio aesthetic, leave prominent empty composition area for SOLD OUT or BACK IN STOCK text overlay post-generation, hyper-realistic product and shelf material detail, shot on 50mm at f/5.6, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: chaotic or cluttered shelf
Avoid in output: product damage or negative presentation
notes: Intents: harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Scarcity messaging is highly effective with Saudi Instagram audiences, particularly for beauty drops and limited-edition F&B. Sold-out posts often generate organic engagement as followers tag each other. Back-in-stock posts drive highest immediate CTR. Use sparingly — overuse diminishes scarcity signal. Arabic caption should accompany: 'نفد من المخزون' (sold out) or 'عاد للمخزون' (back in stock). Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: Event-driven only. Compliance level: standard.
